name: com.pulsemcp/pulsemcp-cms-admin
description: MCP server for managing PulseMCP's CMS — newsletter and MCP server directory.

environmentVariables.name: PULSEMCP_ADMIN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key sent as X-API-Key for admin API authentication.

environmentVariables.name: PULSEMCP_ADMIN_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the admin API.

environmentVariables.name: PULSEMCP_ADMIN_INTERNAL_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Shared secret sent as X-PulseMCP-Internal header for Cloudflare WAF bypass.

environmentVariables.name: TOOL_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of enabled tool groups.

environmentVariables.name: DANGEROUSLY_SKIP_ELICITATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Skip elicitation prompts for destructive tools.

environmentVariables.name: PULSEMCP_CMS_ADMIN_ELICITATION_DESTRUCTIVE
environmentVariables.description: Override elicitation behavior for destructive tools.
